name: media-carrd
description: A custom Lovelace card for Home Assistant to display Radarr and Sonarr queues and libraries

scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=process.env.npm_package_version;const c=fs.readFileSync('CHANGELOG.md','utf8');fs.writeFileSync('CHANGELOG.md',c.replace('## [Unreleased]','## [Unreleased]\n\n## ['+v+']'));" && git add CHANGELOG.md
